## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project architecture (`ARCHITECTURE.md`)
- [ ] I have not mixed responsibilities between layers (Core / Livewire / Theme)
- [ ] New contracts extend existing ones (no modifications to existing contracts)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix or feature works
- [ ] All tests pass (`composer test`)
- [ ] Static analysis passes (`composer analyse`)
- [ ] Code style is correct (`composer format`)
- [ ] No closures stored in public Livewire properties
- [ ] No emojis or unnecessary comments in code
